location: Purchased from a Nomadic Merchant sitting beneath a collapsed structure southeast of Coastal Cave, in western Limgrave, for 900 Runes.
tactics: The merchant is outside Coastal Cave, not inside it — you don't need to clear the cave's dungeon (or its Erdtree Burial Watchdog boss) to buy this shield.
It has no passive effect, making it a safe, no-frills baseline block/parry shield rather than a build-defining pick.
lore: A plain iron roundshield, heavier to carry than a wooden one but offering noticeably better damage negation in return.

builds.name: Generic Strength off-hand
builds.why: Pure Strength scaling with solid all-around negation and no passive makes it a fine placeholder shield for any early Strength-based build.
